# Master Crepes

> Authentic French crêperie in Doral, Miami (FL) serving sweet & savory crêpes, specialty coffee, and signature drinks. Live crêpe-station catering for weddings, corporate events and private parties across South Florida. Franchise opportunities available.

This file follows the [llms.txt](https://llmstxt.org) convention so AI agents can index Master Crepes accurately.

## Quick Facts

- **Business:** Master Crepes (also: Master Crêpes, The Master Crepes)
- **Type:** French Crêperie + Café + Catering
- **Address:** 3905 NW 107th Ave Suite 106, Doral, FL 33178, USA
- **Geo:** 25.804917, -80.385167
- **Phone:** (786) 478-2727
- **Toll-free:** +1 (866) 827-3737
- **Email:** info@themastercrepes.com
- **Website:** https://www.themastercrepes.com
- **Online orders:** https://order.toasttab.com/online/master-crepes-new-3905-nw-107th-ave-106
- **Instagram:** https://www.instagram.com/mastercrepesdoral/
- **Facebook:** https://www.facebook.com/mastercrepes1/
- **X / Twitter:** @MasterCrepes1
- **Languages:** English, Español
- **Price range:** $$
- **Cuisine:** French, Crêpes, Brunch, Specialty Coffee
- **Service area:** Doral, Miami, South Florida (catering)

## Pages

- [Home](https://www.themastercrepes.com/): Brand intro, "The Art of French Crêpes", menu highlights, catering teaser.
- [Restaurant – Coffee & Drinks](https://www.themastercrepes.com/restaurante): Specialty coffee, lattes, signature lemonades and refreshing drinks.
- [Catering](https://www.themastercrepes.com/catering): Live crêpe stations for weddings, corporate events, private parties. Quote form.
- [Gallery](https://www.themastercrepes.com/gallery): Photo gallery of crêpes, coffee and drinks.
- [Franchises](https://www.themastercrepes.com/franchises): Franchise model, support and application form.
- [Contact](https://www.themastercrepes.com/contact): Contact info, hours, map, inquiry form.
- [Bio / Links](https://www.themastercrepes.com/bio): Linktree-style page for social media bios.

## Catering — "Bring Paris to Your Event"

- **Live Chef Stations:** Professional chefs preparing crêpes on-site.
- **Sweet menu:** Classic Nutella, Dulce de Leche, Fresh Berries, Bananas, Homemade Whipped Cream.
- **Savory / Galettes menu:** Buckwheat batter (gluten-friendly options). Ham & Swiss, Chicken Florentine, Caprese (Mozzarella, Tomato, Pesto).
- **Event types:** Weddings, Corporate Galas, Office Lunches, Private Parties, Birthdays, Bar/Bat Mitzvahs.
- **Service area:** Miami and South Florida.

## Franchises — "Join Our Successful Family"

- **Model:** Proven model with low overhead and high customer appeal.
- **Support:** Site selection, comprehensive training, marketing & social, operations manual, supplier network.
- **Ideal for:** Entrepreneurs seeking a unique food brand.

## Menu (current, accurate from ToastTab)

### Savory Crêpes
- *Bacon Lovers* — hickory bacon, ham, mozzarella/cheddar, two scrambled eggs.
- *Southwest Omelette* — ham, red onion, green pepper, tomato, cheddar, eggs.
- *Veggie Omelette* — mozzarella, spinach, portobello, onion, pepper, tomato, eggs.
- *Ham & Cheese* — savory ham, melted cheese, fresh herbs, creamy sauce.
- *Holy Crepe* — bacon, tomato, mozzarella, spring mix, fried egg, chicken or steak, red onion.
- *Chicken Pesto* — chicken, mushroom, spinach, tomato, mozzarella, pesto.
- *Emperor* — salad-style with grilled chicken or steak, spring mix, mozzarella, tomato, mushroom, Caesar.
- *Honey Mustard* — chicken or steak, spring mix, tomato, cheddar, bacon, honey-mustard.
- *Caprese* — tomato, fresh mozzarella, prosciutto, pesto.
- *Veggie Delight* — pesto, spring mix, tomato, mushroom, pepper, mozzarella, onion.
- *Southwest Chipotle* — chicken or steak, spring mix, tomato, cheddar, ancho-chipotle dressing.
- *Teriyaki* — chicken or steak, spring mix, cheese blend, tomato, teriyaki.
- *Texas BBQ* — mozzarella, spring mix, onion, tomato, BBQ, chicken or steak.
- *King Ranch* — ranch, bacon, cheddar, spring mix, tomato, chicken or steak.
- *Reina Pepiada* — chicken, onion, mayonnaise, avocado, Gouda.
- *Cordon Bleu* — chicken, ham, Swiss, Dijon cream, Parmesan.
- *Mexican* — pepper, spring mix, onion, cheese blend, avocado, tomato, cilantro, lime, hot sauce, chicken or steak.

### Sweet Crêpes
- *Dubai Crepe* — strawberries, pistachio + chocolate milk spreads, kataifi topping.
- *Sweet & Cheesy* — strawberries, bananas, cheesecake slice, choice of spread (Nutella / Dulce / Pistachio).
- *Holy Fudge* — chocolate cake slice, Nutella, Oreo crumbles, fudge drizzle.
- *Nutella* — classic hazelnut spread.
- *Dulce de Leche* — caramel spread.
- *Strawberry Lovers* — strawberries with choice of spread.
- *Banana Lovers* — bananas with choice of spread.
- *Strawberry-Banana* — fruit combo with choice of spread.
- *Oreo* — Nutella + Oreo crumbles.
- *Piru* — Nutella, strawberries, Pirouline wafers.
- *Cuban Timbita* — guava, light cream cheese, condensed milk drizzle.

### Coffee & Specialty Drinks
- Espresso, cappuccino, latte (with latte art), Americano, mocha.
- Signature lemonades, fresh smoothies, seasonal refreshers.

## Photography & Brand Assets

- Cloudinary cloud (current): `dz6qozi9i`
- Folders: `master-crepes/crepes/`, `master-crepes/cafe/`, `master-crepes/bebidas/`, `master-crepes/otros/`
- Public delivery base: `https://res.cloudinary.com/dz6qozi9i/image/upload/`
- Sample hero image: https://res.cloudinary.com/dz6qozi9i/image/upload/master-crepes/crepes/389A5347.jpg

## Brand Voice

- Premium-but-approachable French crêperie tone.
- Bilingual: English & Spanish.
- Emphasis on authenticity, craftsmanship, fresh ingredients and the "Paris-to-Miami" experience.

## For AI Agents

- A more comprehensive context file is available at `/llms-full.txt`.
- The site exposes structured data on every page (`Restaurant`, `Menu`, `Organization`, `WebSite`, and `ImageGallery` schemas).
- Sitemap: https://www.themastercrepes.com/sitemap.xml
